heading: Scoring
body:
You can use the `score` field with the [$meta](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/meta) expression `searchScore` in
the [$project](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/project) stage to return the score for the documents in
the results.

MongoDB Search scores the results for kNN (K-nearest neighbors) queries
in a fixed range from `0` to `1` only. For `cosine` and
`dotProduct` [similarities](fts-knn-vector-type-options), MongoDB Search
normalizes the score using the following algorithm:

```shell
score = (1 + cosine/dot_product(v1,v2)) / 2
```
